name: TravelDesk Travel Assistant
description: Multi-agent travel booking assistant with authentication, booking management, sales, payments, and live agent transfer.

TravelDesk_Supervisor.description: Top-level orchestrator that routes customers to the right specialist

Authentication_Agent.description: Verifies customer identity via email code or booking reference

Booking_Manager.description: Helps authenticated customers view, modify, upgrade, or cancel bookings

Fallback_Handler.description: Handles unclear intents by offering clear choices

Farewell_Agent.description: Ends conversations gracefully with feedback collection

Fee_Calculator.description: Delegate agent that calculates change fees and price differences

Live_Agent_Transfer.description: Transfers customers to human agents with full context

Payment_Agent.description: Handles secure payment flow for travel bookings

Refund_Processor.description: Calculates and processes refunds with manager approval for high-value refunds

Sales_Agent.description: Helps customers search and book new travel — flights, hotels, and packages

Welcome_Agent.description: Greets customers and detects returning visitors
